_: TDESCs to download from Lot 51's API. `path` is optional: if blank, the fetch script auto-resolves it via the search index (/api/simdex/search/tdesc?q=*). Override only when the auto-match picks the wrong file. `name` is the local filename — saved as <name>.tdesc into this directory.
_note_chancecard: CareerChanceCard has no standalone TDESC — the schema lives inline inside Career.tdesc as a nested tuple. The simdata library handles chance cards from the embedded definition.

_removed.reason: embedded in Career.tdesc, no separate resource
